Added Event.last_seen_at through a migration, bumped it in the metrics writer (monotonic, ignores count=0), added silent_since_days API filtering, added the Last seen catalog column (hidden by default with bootstrap), and added Silent > 1d/7d/30d toolbar options. Tests: 161 backend, 31 frontend, ruff and mypy clean.

alerting_matching.py: pure rule_matches_anomaly plus simulate_rule_firings with in-memory cooldown and per-scope partitioning. The metrics worker uses the same path. Added POST /alert-destinations/{id}/rules/{id}/simulate?days=N and Pydantic schemas. UI: History button on each rule plus RuleReplayDialog with firings table and noisy warning. Tests: 3 backend tests (matcher cooldown, scope filter, endpoint), all backend (164) and frontend (31) tests green.

Added schema_drifts table, migration, model, and 30d retention. _diff_event_type_schema detects new_field, missing_field, and type_changed; type_changed only applies to auto-created string/json types, so user-curated enum/number/url/boolean fields are not disturbed. Added a metrics pipeline hook before _ensure_event_type_with_fields. Added GET /event-types/{id}/drifts. EventListItem.drift_count is included through a single-query list_events path. UI adds EventDriftBadge on EventRow with details popover. Tests: drift diff unit test (3 types plus idempotent upsert), all tests green.

anomaly_context.py: build_sparkline (8-block Unicode, width=24), format_top_movers (signed %, +inf% guard, value truncation), load_top_movers ordered by abs(z_score), and load_recent_metric_points for project_total/event_type/event. Wired through _build_item_template_context -> _build_items_text -> _build_template_context -> _render_delivery_message with optional session+scan_config_id. New vars: sparkline, top_movers, sparkline_line, top_movers_line. Updated default item templates. session.no_autoflush is critical because otherwise SELECT triggers autoflush on the JSON column and loses later in-place payload_snapshot mutations. Tests: 168 backend (+3 explainability), ruff and mypy clean.
Fixed by giving the two new migrations unique revision IDs and chaining them after the previous head.
Parent scope is complete via tripl-wtu: shared rule matcher, simulate endpoint, Replay UI modal, noisy warning, and tests are present.

Completed remaining parent scope: schema drifts now have an alert scope flag, live delivery/replay candidates, template variables drift_field/drift_type/sample_value/drift_line, UI rule toggle, migration, and tests.

Added _pick_sample_value helper that threads CardinalityResult.sample_values into _diff_event_type_schema for new_field/type_changed drift (missing_field stays null — no observed data). _upsert_schema_drifts persists sample_value and refreshes it on conflict. Both call sites in metrics.py pass cardinality results defensively via getattr to keep mock-based unit tests working. New tripl.worker.tasks.maintenance.cleanup_schema_drifts task + daily Celery beat schedule prunes SchemaDrift rows past DRIFT_RETENTION_DAYS. UI: EventDriftBadge popover renders 'e.g. <sample>' under each drift entry. Tests: 172 backend (+2), ruff+mypy clean.

simulate_rule_firings accepts cooldown_minutes_override (keyword-only). simulate_rule service: _render_firing_item + _render_firings_message build a sync preview reusing alert_templates (no DB-bound sparkline/top_movers — those are session-rich and out of scope for replay). New response fields: rendered_message (overall message text), per-firing rendered_item, cooldown_minutes_used, cooldown_minutes_saved. API endpoint exposes cooldown_minutes_override query param (0..10080). Frontend: RuleReplayDialog gets cooldown override Input; on Replay issues Promise.all(saved, override) when override differs, shows side-by-side FiringsCountBadge with both counts and Noisy flag, plus a Preview <pre> block of rendered_message. Tests: 173 backend (+1 — endpoint asserts override path + preview text), 33 frontend, ruff+mypy+tsc+eslint clean.

Phase A: useEventsQuery hook owns URL filter state (search/implemented/tag/silent_days/reviewed + f./m. prefixed) + deferred+debounced values + isFilterPending + filterEtId/Reviewed/Archived derivation + useInfiniteQuery + flattened rawEvents+total. Phase B: EventsTable presentational component owns the DndContext+SortableContext+TooltipProvider tree, header with FilterableHead+ColumnFilter, virtualized TableBody+EventRow mapping, EmptyState. EventsPage.tsx 1412 -> 1147 (-265 lines, -19%). Mutations and layout glue still live in EventsPage. Tests: 33 frontend (unchanged), tsc+lint clean.

Already shipped (commits 933c45e / 4131e5f / 062b0aa, well before this session). frontend/src/components/command-palette.tsx implements: global Cmd+K / Ctrl+K binding via CommandPaletteProvider wired into Layout; cmdk-react Dialog with Navigate / Current project / Settings & event-type sections; TanStack-cached projectsApi.list, eventTypesApi.list, eventsApi.list(search) with staleTime=30-60s; project-scoped entries when on a /p/:slug route, global entries otherwise; debounced fuzzy event search; Esc closes. 3 passing tests at command-palette.test.tsx.

New plan_revisions table (Alembic 9e0f1a2b3c4d). build_plan_snapshot constructs deterministic JSON over event types + field definitions + events + variables + meta fields + relations (sorted by natural key, UUIDs / order / timestamps excluded from comparison fields). compute_plan_diff_entries does natural-key set difference per entity type, surfaces field-level changes for the fields that matter (field_type, is_required, enum_options, implemented/reviewed/archived, etc.). API: POST/GET /projects/{slug}/revisions, GET /revisions/{id}, GET /revisions/{id}/diff?compare_to={other}. Frontend: HistoryTab in ProjectSettingsPage with revision list + 'Snapshot now' button + side-by-side diff against previous revision. Tests: 176 backend (+3 — snapshot composition, diff classification, full POST→GET→diff round-trip), 33 frontend. ruff+mypy+tsc+eslint clean.

Postgres warehouse adapter shipped: new PostgresAdapter (full BaseAdapter contract using psycopg, date_bin bucketing, GROUPING SETS, ROW_NUMBER top-N), registry-based build_adapter factory replacing 4 duplicate _build_adapter functions, DBType enum + db_type selector in DataSourcesPage with port auto-default. Backend 179/179 pytest, ruff/mypy clean. Frontend 33/33 vitest, lint/typecheck clean.

BigQuery warehouse adapter shipped: BigQueryAdapter via google-cloud-bigquery SDK, TIMESTAMP_BIN bucketing (week normalized to 7 day, month routed to TIMESTAMP_TRUNC), JSON_KEYS for path discovery, GROUPING SETS + ROW_NUMBER for top-N. Service-account JSON stored in password_encrypted, project_id in host, default dataset in database_name, optional location in extra_params. Frontend DataSourcesPage switches form to project_id + default-dataset + textarea credentials when bigquery is selected. Backend 179/179 pytest, ruff+mypy clean. Frontend 33/33 vitest, lint+typecheck clean.
